title: Lily Pads Expansion
description: This mod adds a variety of new lily pads in different colors and shapes that naturally spawn in specific biomes.
body:
![Lily Pads Preview](https://i.imgur.com/Eez1b9h.png) This mod expands the variety of lily pads in Minecraft, bringing more color and life to lakes, rivers and swampy areas. Warm biomes feature more **vibrant colors**, while colder regions introduce **cooler tones** that naturally fit their environment.

## 🌸 Features - Biome and **temperature-based** color variation - Designed to **fit seamlessly** into vanilla Minecraft - **Blends well** with other biome and world gen mods *If your world was already generated, lilypads will only spawn in newly generated chunks — simply explore further.* ## ⚙️ Shader Support Some shaders may require manual configuration: - inside the mod's assets/shaders is a block.properties.txt file already prepared, copy what you need into your own block.properties.txt file found inside your zipped shader, **do not unzip your shader** ### Additional Info - More content and **additional loader** support may be added in future updates. - You are allowed to review this mod or use it in your mod pack, with properly given credit. - Any other distribution **is not permitted.** ### Please do not redistribute this mod, re-uploading it to other websites is not permitted. ## 💖 Support If you like this mod, consider supporting me: [![Support me](https://i.imgur.com/1PyT37T.png)](https://ko-fi.com/lillouarts)
